what: 1) Basic app structure: ui and server
title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: phaserR game lives inside regular Shiny app. UI need load Phaser.js dependencies calling ui() method. set_shiny_session() method helper set Shiny session inside R6 object private environment reused shinyphaser methods many times.
code: library(shiny) library(phaserR)  game <- PhaserGame$new(width = 1500, height = 800)  ui <- tagList(   game$ui() )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   game$set_shiny_session() }  shinyApp(ui, server)

title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: First add simply image serve background game.
code: floor <- game$add_image(   name = "floor",   url = "assets/hedgehog/terrain/grass.png",   x = 800,   y = 300 ) library(shiny) library(phaserR)  game <- PhaserGame$new(width = 1500, height = 800)  ui <- tagList(   game$ui() )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   game$set_shiny_session()    floor <- game$add_image(     name = "floor",     url = "assets/hedgehog/terrain/grass.png",     x = 800,     y = 300   ) }  shinyApp(ui, server)

title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: Create player sprite sprite sheet.
code: hedgehog <- game$add_sprite(   name = "hedgehog",   url = "assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_32.png",   x = 140,   y = 260,   frameWidth = 32,   frameHeight = 32,   frameCount = 5,   frameRate = 6 ) library(shiny) library(phaserR)  game <- PhaserGame$new(width = 1500, height = 800)  ui <- tagList(   game$ui() )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   game$set_shiny_session()    floor <- game$add_image(     name = "floor",     url = "assets/hedgehog/terrain/grass.png",     x = 800,     y = 300   )    hedgehog <- game$add_sprite(     name = "hedgehog",     url = "assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_32.png",     x = 140,     y = 260,     frameWidth = 32,     frameHeight = 32,     frameCount = 5,     frameRate = 6   ) }  shinyApp(ui, server)

title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: Attach keyboard movement sprite.
code: hedgehog$add_player_controls(   directions = c("left", "right", "up", "down"),   speed = 220 ) library(shiny) library(phaserR)  game <- PhaserGame$new(width = 1500, height = 800)  ui <- tagList(   game$ui() )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   game$set_shiny_session()    floor <- game$add_image(     name = "floor",     url = "assets/hedgehog/terrain/grass.png",     x = 800,     y = 300   )    hedgehog <- game$add_sprite(     name = "hedgehog",     url = "assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_32.png",     x = 140,     y = 260,     frameWidth = 32,     frameHeight = 32,     frameCount = 5,     frameRate = 6   )    hedgehog$add_player_controls(     directions = c("left", "right", "up", "down"),     speed = 220   ) }  shinyApp(ui, server)

title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: like now apply animation hedgehog moves.  Add directional animations play one default.
code: moves <- c("move_left", "move_right", "move_up", "move_down")  for (move in moves) {   hedgehog$add_animation(     suffix = move,     url = paste0("assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_", move, "_32.png"),     frameWidth = 32,     frameHeight = 32,     frameRate = 5   ) } library(shiny) library(phaserR)  game <- PhaserGame$new(width = 1500, height = 800)  ui <- tagList(   game$ui() )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   game$set_shiny_session()    floor <- game$add_image(     name = "floor",     url = "assets/hedgehog/terrain/grass.png",     x = 800,     y = 300   )    hedgehog <- game$add_sprite(     name = "hedgehog",     url = "assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_32.png",     x = 140,     y = 260,     frameWidth = 32,     frameHeight = 32,     frameCount = 5,     frameRate = 6   )    hedgehog$add_player_controls(     directions = c("left", "right", "up", "down"),     speed = 220   )    moves <- c("move_left", "move_right", "move_up", "move_down")    for (move in moves) {     hedgehog$add_animation(       suffix = move,       url = paste0("assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_", move, "_32.png"),       frameWidth = 32,       frameHeight = 32,       frameRate = 5     )   } }  shinyApp(ui, server)

what: 6) Add overlap with other objects (collect apples)
title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: Use overlap two objects can share space trigger events.
code: score <- reactiveVal(0) apples <- game$add_static_group("apples", "assets/hedgehog/perks/apple_20.png")  apples$create(260, 140) apples$create(640, 180) apples$create(730, 390)  score_text <- game$add_text(text = "Score: 0", id = "score", x = 20, y = 20)  game$add_overlap(   object_one_name = "hedgehog",   group_name = "apples",   callback_fun = function(evt) {     apples$disable(evt)        # hide collected apple     score(score() + 1)     score_text$set(paste("Score:", score()))   },   input = input ) library(shiny) library(phaserR)  game <- PhaserGame$new(width = 1500, height = 800)  ui <- tagList(   game$ui() )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   game$set_shiny_session()    floor <- game$add_image(     name = "floor",     url = "assets/hedgehog/terrain/grass.png",     x = 800,     y = 300   )    hedgehog <- game$add_sprite(     name = "hedgehog",     url = "assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_32.png",     x = 140,     y = 260,     frameWidth = 32,     frameHeight = 32,     frameCount = 5,     frameRate = 6   )    hedgehog$add_player_controls(     directions = c("left", "right", "up", "down"),     speed = 220   )    moves <- c("move_left", "move_right", "move_up", "move_down")    for (move in moves) {     hedgehog$add_animation(       suffix = move,       url = paste0("assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_", move, "_32.png"),       frameWidth = 32,       frameHeight = 32,       frameRate = 5     )   }    score <- reactiveVal(0)   apples <- game$add_static_group("apples", "assets/hedgehog/perks/apple_20.png")    apples$create(260, 140)   apples$create(640, 180)   apples$create(730, 390)    score_text <- game$add_text(text = "Score: 0", id = "score", x = 20, y = 20)    game$add_overlap(     object_one_name = "hedgehog",     group_name = "apples",     callback_fun = function(evt) {       apples$disable(evt)        # hide collected apple       score(score() + 1)       score_text$set(paste("Score:", score()))     },     input = input   ) } shinyApp(ui, server)

title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: Use collision objects block .

title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: Create one enemies move . enemy overlaps player, end game.
code: enemy <- game$add_sprite(   name = "badger_1",   url = "assets/hedgehog/sprites/badger_move_left_50.png",   x = 700,   y = 300,   frameWidth = 50,   frameHeight = 50,   frameCount = 1,   frameRate = 1 )  enemy$set_in_motion(   dirX = -1,   dirY = 0,   speed = 70,   distance = 150,   lag = 0 )  game$add_overlap(   sprite_name = "hedgehog",   object_two_name = "badger_1",   callback_fun = function(evt) {     showNotification("Game over: enemy got you!", type = "error")   },   input = input )

title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: Put pieces together:
code: library(shiny) library(phaserR)  game <- PhaserGame$new(width = 900, height = 550)  ui <- tagList(game$ui())  server <- function(input, output, session) {   game$set_shiny_session()    floor <- game$add_static_group("floor", "assets/hedgehog/terrain/grass.png")   for (x in seq(100, 800, by = 200)) for (y in seq(100, 500, by = 150)) floor$create(x, y)    walls <- game$add_static_group("walls", "assets/hedgehog/terrain/wall.png")   walls$create(450, 80); walls$create(450, 470); walls$create(80, 280); walls$create(820, 280)    hedgehog <- game$add_sprite(     name = "hedgehog", url = "assets/hedgehog/sprites/hedgehog_32.png",     x = 140, y = 260, frameWidth = 32, frameHeight = 32, frameCount = 5, frameRate = 6   )   hedgehog$add_player_controls(c("left", "right", "up", "down"), speed = 220)    apples <- game$add_static_group("apples", "assets/hedgehog/perks/apple_20.png")   apples$create(260, 140); apples$create(640, 180); apples$create(730, 390)    score <- reactiveVal(0)   score_text <- game$add_text("Score: 0", id = "score", x = 20, y = 20)    game$add_collider("hedgehog", group_name = "walls")    game$add_overlap("hedgehog", group_name = "apples", callback_fun = function(evt) {     apples$disable(evt)     score(score() + 1)     score_text$set(paste("Score:", score()))   }, input = input)    enemy <- game$add_sprite(     "badger_1", "assets/hedgehog/sprites/badger_move_left_50.png",     x = 700, y = 300, frameWidth = 50, frameHeight = 50, frameCount = 1, frameRate = 1   )   enemy$set_in_motion(dirX = -1, dirY = 0, speed = 70, distance = 150, lag = 0)    game$add_overlap("hedgehog", object_two_name = "badger_1", callback_fun = function(evt) {     showNotification("Game over: enemy got you!", type = "error")   }, input = input) }  shinyApp(ui, server)

title: Build your first phaserR game (hedgehog vignette)
text: Add multiple enemies random paths. Add level progression win/lose states. Add boosts power-ups keyboard controls. Reuse patterns inst/examples/hedgehog.R richer game loop.

title: PhaserGame — PhaserGame
text: R6 class create manage Phaser game within Shiny application. Provides methods adding sprites, animations, images, backgrounds, controls, collision handling.

title: PhaserGame — PhaserGame
text: id Character. ID Game container. Used HTML element ID game canvas rendered.

Speed pixels/second. distance Numeric. Distance pixels travel stopping. lag Numeric. Optional delay sending command (defaults distance/speed).
